user.title: BToddB Reminders
user.description: BToddB Reminders are delivered as a push notification to a notify entity.

data_description.notify_service: Select the notify entity to push due reminders to. See the README Configure section for how to set one up.
Select the notify entity to push due reminders to. See the README Configure section for how to set one up.

create.name: Create reminder
create.description: Add a time-based reminder at an absolute time or a relative delay.

message.name: Message
message.description: What to remind about, in the user's own words.

when.name: When
when.description: Absolute ISO 8601 local datetime for a specific clock time or date. Leave empty for relative delays and use in_minutes instead.

in_minutes.name: In minutes
in_minutes.description: Minutes from now, for relative delays. Takes priority over when when both are given.
